name: Allen
job:
I know how to
enter the abyss!
answer1:
The abyss
may only
be approached
by ship!
answer2:
The ship must
have a magically
strengthened
hull!
question:
Hast thou such
a vessel?

name: Frontis
job:
Welcome to Cove,
the hidden city
of wisdom.
answer1:
Herein is found
much wisdom and
peace.
question: Art thou well?
no:
Visit our
healers, I am
sure they can
help thee!

name: Sloven
answer2:
Only the ghost
of Isaac who
haunts the inn
at Skara Brae
can tell thee.
question:
Hast thou
seen him?
no:
Stay at the inn
until he shows
himself!

name: Mentorian
answer2:
Since thou dost
bear the ankh I
shall tell thee.
A gate spell
requires ash,
pearl, and
mandrake root!
question:
Dost thou
disagree?

name: the ankh
answer2:
One must be 8
parts avatar,
have the key of
3 parts, the
word of passage
and know the
pure axiom!
question:
Dost thou
seek help?

name: Paul
answer1:
I light a
candle to our
love, in love
our problems
disappear.
answer2:
But all in all
we soon discover
that one and one
is all we long
to hear!
question:
Wilt thou
listen?

name: Linda
answer1:
All round the
world, little
children being
born to the
world.
answer2:
Got to give them
all we can 'til
the quest is
won, then will
the work be
done!
question: Wilt thou help?

name: Merlin
answer1:
The black stone
is caught in a
moon gate!
answer2:
Stand where the
gate of both
moons dark shall
appear. Search
when the moons
go dark!
question:
Dost thou
study magic?
yes:
Best of luck
with thy
studies!

name: Draconian
answer1:
There are
eight possible
combinations of
truth, love and
courage. Each
of the eight
virtues is one
of those
combinations!
question: Knew ye this?

name: Blissful
job:
I know much
of the codex!
answer1:
The shrine ankh
knows how to
enter the
chamber of the
codex!
answer2:
Meditate at
the shrines
of honesty,
compassion and
valor for 3
cycles to know
how to enter!
question: A

name:
Rabindranath
tagore
answer1:
In love,
all life's
contradictions
dissolve and
disappear.
question:
Dost thou seek
to carry love in
thy heart?

name: Brother Zair
job:
I sit and watch
the river.
answer2:
The kings of the
castles which
represent the
three principles
of virtue each
know but one
syllable of the
word of passage!
question: Agree?

name: Spellbind
answer1:
One must know
the combination
of the three
principles of
virtue!
answer2:
The combination
of the three
principles of
virtue equals
the measure of
time and space!
question: A

name: Shaman
job:
I study the
'one' thing that
is the secret to
the codex!
answer2:
The one pure
axiom is more
endless than the
changing tides,
more eternal
than day and
night!
question: A

name: Charm
job:
I ponder the key
to the axiom.
answer2:
The 1 pure axiom
encompasses
all things.
question:
Know ye what
they are?
no:
The truths of
the universe,
the love of the
heart, and the
courage of the
soul!

name: Circe
answer1:
The whole of the
axiom is greater
than all its
parts!
answer2:
The measure of
unending love,
the limitless
courage needed
to face all
obstacles,the
truth which
encompasses all
things!
question: A
